r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Golfers believe their contact problems are caused by not keeping their head down, not keeping their left arm straight, not shifting their weight properly, not keeping the clubface closed, or simply not practicing enough. They think the ball should be contacted at the bottom of the swing arc.
relatability_triggers: There's only ONE reason your golf game is so inconsistent right now... CONTACT.

Existing belief: Golfers believe their contact problems are caused by not keeping their head down, not keeping their left arm straight, not shifting their weight properly, not keeping the clubface closed, or simply not practicing enough. They think the ball should be contacted at the bottom of the swing arc.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: Simple Strike Sequence / Perfect Strike Point: The Simple Strike Sequence is a 10-shot training sequence that retrains your body to hit the 'perfect strike point' — ball first, then ground — instead of trying to hit the ball at the bottom of the swing. Part 1 (first 5 shots): The 'No-Turn Backswing' technique lets you FEEL exactly where the club needs to be in the backswing without thinking about takeaway, clubface angle, or confusing swing mechanics. It's so simple — if you can chop wood, you can do it. It automatically gets your swing on the correct path for perfect contact, dials in your angle of attack, and stops you from focusing on hitting the ball at the bottom of the swing. Part 2 (next 5 shots): The 'Low Point Control Drill' automatically tricks your body and arms into taking 5 surgical divots with your irons — without you ever TRYING to hit ball first, then turf. It happens naturally when you do this part of the sequence. Your club starts collecting the ball on the way down and nipping the ground at the EXACT low point needed for flush contact. The result: your clubface hits the ball FIRST, then reaches the bottom of the swing, creating a perfect divot in front of where your ball was. You're able to fully USE your clubface angle to send the ball higher and farther. This creates perfectly flush contact, the addictive sound of pure striking, and 15-25 yards additional distance.
mechanism_proof_points: Pioneered by a technique observed from Moe Norman, whom Tiger Woods considered one of the purest ball-strikers of all time
Martin Chuck — PGA teaching professional, coached Major winners Darren Clarke and Mike Weir
Proven in 50,000+ amateur golf lessons over 35 years
LIVE documented transformations in over 1,000 golf academies
Known as the 'peoples' coach' for his work with amateurs
unique_differentiators: Unlike all traditional swing advice that treats symptoms (head position, arm angle, weight shift), this sequence addresses the ONE root cause of ALL contact problems — the low point of the swing. It requires only 10 shots to implement, works for any skill level, and produces permanent results even with an imperfect swing.

primary_transformation.statement: Fix ALL of your ball contact issues PERMANENTLY with ONE simple technique after just 10 shots on the range, turning fat shots, thin shots, and whiffs into perfectly flushed shots that fly 15-25 yards farther
primary_transformation.campaign_thesis: Contact is everything in golf. Without solid contact, nothing else matters — no swing speed, no swing path, no distance gains. The root cause of poor contact is trying to hit the ball at the bottom of your swing, which is physically impossible because your body rotates and shifts during the swing. Once you learn to hit the 'perfect strike point' (ball first, then ground), everything changes permanently.

headline.vsl_adaptation: There's only ONE reason your golf game is so inconsistent right now... CONTACT. What I'm about to share with you could completely change how you think about this problem - and what becomes possible when you know the truth...

lead.full_text: There's only ONE reason your golf game is so inconsistent right now... CONTACT. Fact is... when you struggle to make consistently flush contact with the ball... It makes it IMPOSSIBLE to play good golf... let alone truly enjoy the game. That's why, right now, I'm going to show you a simple SEQUENCE/TECHNIQUE for turning your fat shots... thin shots... and even whiffs... into perfectly flushed shots... That consistently hit the dead center of the clubface... Fly 15 to 25 yards farther... And instantly give you the confidence to play respectably well — even when you're paired with low handicap ringers. I'll also show you why the typical advice for fixing your contact issues is DEAD WRONG... Things like... 'Keep your head down'... 'Make sure your left arm is straight'... 'Shift your weight...' Or 'keep the clubface closed'... All these things... are like putting bandaids on bullet wounds. Because they don't fix the REAL reason you or anyone else on the planet has contact issues. So it doesn't matter if you spend a thousand hours on the range... pay a fortune in lessons... or watch weeks' worth of YouTube videos... Until you address this ONE root cause of poor contact... NOTHING will ever change.
lead.hook_sentence: There's only ONE reason your golf game is so inconsistent right now... CONTACT.

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Golfers believe their contact problems are caused by not keeping their head down, not keeping their left arm straight, not shifting their weight properly, not keeping the clubface closed, or simply not practicing enough. They think the ball should be contacted at the bottom of the swing arc.
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: The ONLY reason any golfer makes poor contact is that the ball is NOT supposed to be at the bottom of the swing. Because the body rotates and relocates during the swing, the low point shifts forward. Trying to hit the ball at the bottom of the swing guarantees fat shots (club hits ground before ball), thin shots (compensatory lift to avoid ground), and shanks (open clubface bouncing off turf into hosel). The 'perfect strike point' requires hitting ball FIRST, then ground — creating a divot IN FRONT of where the ball was.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: YouTube videos, range practice, expensive lessons, and traditional swing thoughts all fail because they address symptoms (head position, arm angle, weight shift) instead of the root cause. You could spend a thousand hours on the range or pay a fortune in lessons, but if you're still trying to hit the ball at the bottom of your swing, nothing will ever change. These approaches are 'like putting bandaids on bullet wounds.'

villain_profile.villain_name: Conventional golf instruction / traditional swing advice
villain_profile.villain_motivation: Traditional golf instruction focuses on swing aesthetics and individual mechanics (head position, arm straightness, weight shift) rather than the foundational physics of contact. YouTube content and magazine tips perpetuate these surface-level fixes because they're easy to teach and sound reasonable, but they never address WHY contact fails.
villain_profile.villain_evidence: Students consistently report trying these fixes with zero improvement: 'I've probably watched 100 hours of Youtube videos to learn how to make better contact.' Players who've taken over 100 hours of in-person lessons still hit 7-9 thinned shots per round.

key_metaphors: Bandaids on bullet wounds — traditional advice treats symptoms, not the cause
Wheels on a car — without wheels (contact), the car (your game) can't go anywhere. You remain stuck.
Clock/circle around the body — the swing path visualized as a circle showing how the low point shifts as the body rotates
Chopping wood — the no-turn backswing is as simple as a wood-chopping motion
Dollar-bill shaped divots — visual proof of correct contact, divot in front of ball position
countersells: YouTube videos don't work because they teach surface-level swing thoughts (head down, arm straight) that don't address low point control
Range practice alone doesn't work because repetition of incorrect contact pattern just reinforces the problem
Expensive in-person lessons often miss the root cause — one student took 100+ hours of lessons and still thinned 7-9 shots per round
Swing speed training is wasted without solid contact — 'It doesn't matter if you gain 15 miles per hour of swing speed... If you don't make solid contact, then that extra speed will go to WASTE'
Inside-out swing path won't fix a slice without solid contact — 'If you don't make solid contact, then you'll STILL struggle with a slice'

mechanism.name: Simple Strike Sequence / Perfect Strike Point
mechanism.explanation_text: The Simple Strike Sequence is a 10-shot training sequence that retrains your body to hit the 'perfect strike point' — ball first, then ground — instead of trying to hit the ball at the bottom of the swing. Part 1 (first 5 shots): The 'No-Turn Backswing' technique lets you FEEL exactly where the club needs to be in the backswing without thinking about takeaway, clubface angle, or confusing swing mechanics. It's so simple — if you can chop wood, you can do it. It automatically gets your swing on the correct path for perfect contact, dials in your angle of attack, and stops you from focusing on hitting the ball at the bottom of the swing. Part 2 (next 5 shots): The 'Low Point Control Drill' automatically tricks your body and arms into taking 5 surgical divots with your irons — without you ever TRYING to hit ball first, then turf. It happens naturally when you do this part of the sequence. Your club starts collecting the ball on the way down and nipping the ground at the EXACT low point needed for flush contact. The result: your clubface hits the ball FIRST, then reaches the bottom of the swing, creating a perfect divot in front of where your ball was. You're able to fully USE your clubface angle to send the ball higher and farther. This creates perfectly flush contact, the addictive sound of pure striking, and 15-25 yards additional distance.
credibility_anchors: Pioneered by a technique observed from Moe Norman, whom Tiger Woods considered one of the purest ball-strikers of all time
Martin Chuck — PGA teaching professional, coached Major winners Darren Clarke and Mike Weir
Proven in 50,000+ amateur golf lessons over 35 years
LIVE documented transformations in over 1,000 golf academies
Known as the 'peoples' coach' for his work with amateurs
mechanism.uniqueness_claim: Unlike all traditional swing advice that treats symptoms (head position, arm angle, weight shift), this sequence addresses the ONE root cause of ALL contact problems — the low point of the swing. It requires only 10 shots to implement, works for any skill level, and produces permanent results even with an imperfect swing.

e5_mechanism_type.explanation: The concept of ball-first contact and forward shaft lean is well known among advanced golfers and teaching pros. However, the reframe here is powerful: it's NOT about any of the dozens of swing thoughts golfers obsess over — it's about ONE thing (low point control). The 'ball is not the bottom of the swing' insight, while technically basic physics, is presented as a revelation to the target audience (struggling amateurs). The mechanism reframes the entire problem from 'your swing is broken in many ways' to 'you just don't understand where the bottom of your swing is.' The proprietary packaging (10-shot sequence, No-Turn Backswing, Low Point Control Drill) elevates it toward E4 territory, but the underlying concept is a reframe of existing knowledge.
e5_mechanism_type.market_sophistication_fit: Stage 3-4: The golf instruction market is highly sophisticated. Amateurs have been bombarded with swing tips, YouTube videos, and training aids. This mechanism succeeds by simplifying the problem to ONE root cause (low point position) and packaging the solution as a quick-result sequence, differentiating from the endless complexity of typical golf instruction.

mechanism.placement_density: Teased in lead, explained in full detail through mid-body with 3D animations and visual aids, proven through testimonials and before/after demonstrations, referenced in offer section and close. Mechanism explanation is the centerpiece of the VSL.

Moe Norman sitting in a chair — balls landing within feet of each other, demonstrating what flawless contact looks like

Divot pattern footage showing perfectly flush iron divots in a line
mechanism.mechanism_villain_pairing: The mechanism (Simple Strike Sequence targeting low point control) directly defeats the villain (traditional swing advice that ignores low point position). The copy shows that ALL conventional tips fail because they don't address WHERE the club contacts the ground relative to the ball. The sequence bypasses all that noise with a single root-cause fix.

proof_inventory.proof_sequence: The VSL front-loads authority proof (50,000 lessons, Tiger Woods/Moe Norman connection, Major winner coaching), then inserts early testimonials from students who tried everything else. The mid-body is dominated by visual demonstration proof (3D animations, slow-motion video showing exactly WHY contact fails). After the mechanism reveal, the trigger event provides a real-time proof moment (group lesson with instant results). Multiple testimonials punctuate the mid-to-late body. The offer section layers in Scratch Club instructor credentials (Golf Digest rankings, tour wins). The close section bookends with more before/after testimonials and customer count social proof (259,000 customers).

story_beats.summary: Martin Chuck was a young golfer who shagged balls on the range for the legendary Moe Norman, witnessing firsthand what flawless ball contact looks like — every ball landing within feet of the previous one.
key_details: Used to shag balls for Moe Norman
Tiger Woods considered Moe one of the purest ball strikers ever
Moe's contact was so consistent Martin could sit in a chair and balls landed within feet of each other
Moe didn't have a 'picture-perfect' swing but his contact was flawless

story_beats.summary: As Martin progressed into teaching as a PGA professional (after playing on the Canadian Tour), he witnessed the same frustrating pattern: amateurs making the exact same contact mistakes over and over, unable to improve despite lessons and practice.
key_details: Played on the Canadian Tour
Became PGA teaching professional passionate about amateur golf
Saw amateurs hitting behind the ball, on top of the ball, unable to get ball airborne
Everyone wanted distance/slice fixes but the real issue was contact

story_beats.summary: Martin realized the #1 lesson from Moe: contact is EVERYTHING in golf. And the root cause of ALL contact problems is that golfers try to hit the ball at the bottom of their swing — which is physically impossible because the body rotates and the low point shifts forward during the downswing.
key_details: The ball is NOT at the bottom of the swing — this is the universal misconception
The body rotates and relocates, shifting the low point forward
All fat shots, thin shots, and shanks stem from this one misunderstanding
Contact is the foundation — without it, nothing else (speed, path, distance) matters

story_beats.summary: Martin spent two decades perfecting a swing sequence that teaches amateurs to hit the 'perfect strike point' — ball first, then ground. He tested it in an experimental group lesson and achieved instant results with all skill levels.
key_details: Spent first two decades of career perfecting the sequence
Hosted experimental group lesson with over a dozen students
Students ranged from absolute beginners to 20+ year veterans
Results came in minutes — 2 minutes for the veteran, under 10 shots for others
20-year veteran went from chunking to flushing 5 in a row

story_beats.summary: Martin partnered with Performance Golf to bring the Simple Strike Sequence to the masses, filming HD video training at the Raven Golf Course in Arizona. The sequence has now changed hundreds of thousands of golfers' lives.
key_details: Partnered with Performance Golf (industry leader in online golf instruction)
Professional film crew with three $45,000 cameras at Raven Golf Course, Arizona
Multiple camera angles, slow-motion shots
Lifetime access, step-by-step video training
Going to change hundreds of thousands of golfers' lives

story_architecture.lesson_or_moral: Contact is everything in golf. You don't need a perfect swing — you need to understand WHERE to make contact (ball first, then ground). Two decades of teaching 50,000+ students proves this one root cause fix transforms any golfer's game in minutes.
story_architecture.persuasion_function: Build authority (Martin's lineage from Moe Norman through touring and teaching), create identification (his students represent every prospect), prove mechanism (the Moe Norman story validates the 'contact is king' thesis), demonstrate transformation (the group lesson trigger event proves instant results for all levels)
story_architecture.full_story_text: Now, long before I coached Major winners like Darren Clarke and Mike Weir... And before I was known as the 'peoples' coach' after hosting more than 1,000 golf academies... I discovered this breakthrough... I used to shag balls on the range for the great Moe Norman... Who Tiger Woods claims is one of the purest ball strikers to ever play the game... Moe would hit the ball so flush and consistently... I could literally sit in a chair out on the range... And every ball landed within FEET of the previous one... Experiencing that up close taught me a priceless lesson - which I'm going to share with you here today. You see... As my career progressed... I ended up playing on the Canadian Tour... And while grinding on Tour was great... What I'm MOST passionate about is working with amateur players as a PGA teaching professional...
story_architecture.story_callbacks: Moe Norman is referenced multiple times: first in the lead (Tiger Woods considered the technique's originator one of the purest ball strikers), then in the origin story (Martin shagging balls for Moe), then in the 'you don't need a perfect swing' section (Moe's unconventional swing with flawless contact). 'Contact is everything' — the lesson from Moe — becomes the VSL's thesis statement and is repeated throughout.
story_architecture.emotional_peak: The moment when the 20-year veteran golfer who was chunking every shot starts flushing 5 shots in a row after just 2 minutes with the Simple Strike Sequence — this is the proof-of-concept moment that validates everything Martin has been building toward.

section_sequence.purpose: Declare the ONE root problem (contact), establish stakes, promise solution
section_sequence.key_content: There's only ONE reason your golf game is inconsistent — CONTACT. When you can't make flush contact, it's IMPOSSIBLE to play good golf. Simple sequence fixes fat shots, thin shots, whiffs into perfectly flushed shots. 15-25 yards farther. Confidence to play with ringers.

section_sequence.purpose: Discredit conventional advice, tease real root cause, establish traditional instruction as the villain
section_sequence.key_content: Typical advice is DEAD WRONG — keep head down, left arm straight, shift weight, keep clubface closed — all bandaids on bullet wounds. Hours on range, fortune in lessons, YouTube videos — nothing works until you address the ONE root cause.

section_sequence.purpose: Establish Martin's authority and inject early social proof
section_sequence.key_content: Pioneered by someone Tiger Woods considered purest ball striker ever. Proven in 50,000 lessons over 35 years. LIVE documented transformations in 1,000+ academies. Testimonial clips from converted skeptics.

section_sequence.purpose: Build Martin Chuck's backstory, Moe Norman connection, establish teaching passion
section_sequence.key_content: Coached Major winners. Known as 'peoples' coach.' Shagged balls for Moe Norman. Balls landing within feet of each other. Priceless lesson learned. Canadian Tour. PGA teaching professional.

section_sequence.purpose: Amplify the contact problem by showing it's the root of ALL golf issues
section_sequence.key_content: Amateurs making same mistakes. Without solid contact, you can NEVER fix distance, slicing, or scores. Graphic: contact is the root of all swing issues. Even with 15 mph more swing speed or perfect inside-out path — without contact, it's all wasted.

section_sequence.purpose: Reveal the hidden truth — the ball is NOT at the bottom of the swing
section_sequence.key_content: 3D animation: ball looks like it's at the bottom of swing at address, but it's WRONG. Body rotates and relocates, shifting low point forward. The ONLY reason anyone makes poor contact is this misconception. Ball will NEVER be at bottom of swing.

section_sequence.purpose: Demonstrate with visual proof how the root cause creates every type of bad contact
section_sequence.key_content: Slow-motion video showing: fat shots (club hits ground before ball), thin shots (player lifts to compensate), shanks (open face bounces into hosel). Each shot type proven as consequence of the root cause.

section_sequence.purpose: Reveal the solution — the 'perfect strike point' and how the Simple Strike Sequence achieves it
section_sequence.key_content: Perfect strike point: clubface hits ball FIRST, then ground, creating divot in front. Two-part sequence: No-Turn Backswing (5 shots) + Low Point Control Drill (5 shots). Simple as chopping wood. Works even with imperfect swing. Produces 15-25 yards more distance.

section_sequence.purpose: Validate mechanism through group lesson trigger event and testimonial parade
section_sequence.key_content: Experimental group lesson: dozen+ students, all levels. 20-year vet: chunking to flushing 5 in a row in 2 minutes. Testimonials from beginners, experienced players, lifetime strugglers. Before/after split-screen clips.

section_sequence.purpose: Transition from education to offer, reveal the Simple Strike Sequence Video Training product
section_sequence.key_content: Previously only available in-person (1-on-1 or academies with year-long waitlists). Partnered with Performance Golf. Professional film crew, $45,000 cameras, Raven Golf Course in Arizona. HD video training, step-by-step. Lifetime access. Never before released.

section_sequence.purpose: Stack bonuses to build perceived value before price reveal
section_sequence.key_content: Simple Strike Driver Series ($97 FREE), Scratch Club 14-day pass ($97 FREE), LIVESTREAM Training Academy ($300 FREE), Tour Striker Experience drawing (Priceless), Confidential Equipment Guide ($250 FREE). Total: $744+ in bonuses.

section_sequence.purpose: Anchor high, reveal low price, justify value
section_sequence.key_content: Academy costs $3,500+ with travel. Not paying $744 for bonuses. Not even $197 (main website price). Today: one payment of $47-$159 (multiple price tests). Less than 3% of academy cost.

section_sequence.purpose: Remove all risk from the purchase decision
section_sequence.key_content: 365-Day Flush It Or It's Free 100% Money Back Guarantee PLUS unconditional refund policy. Most generous in the industry. Take up to a year to decide. Zero risk.

section_sequence.purpose: Present two options (do nothing vs. join), future pace transformation, create urgency
section_sequence.key_content: Two options: do nothing (stuck in same place in 6 months) or invest in Simple Strike Sequence. Flush contact on command. No more overthinking, embarrassment, mulligans. Dollar bill divots. Hitting greens in regulation. Shooting dream scores. 'You know what's more fun than great golf? NOTHING.' Limited time pricing, presentation ending.

transition_techniques: 'That's why, right now, I'm going to show you...' — transitions from problem declaration to promise
'This sequence was pioneered by a guy Tiger Woods considered...' — transitions from promise to credibility
'Alright, so by now YOU KNOW contact is king...' — transitions from authority building to problem agitation
'Let me show you why...' — transitions from tease to root cause reveal with visual proof
'That's why learning to make contact at the perfect strike point is so important' — transitions from root cause to mechanism solution
'So you're probably wondering... Well Martin, what IS the perfect strike point in my swing?' — anticipatory question transition
'Check out what happened...' — transitions from mechanism explanation to trigger event proof
'So let me show you how you can start using this for yourself RIGHT NOW' — transitions from education to offer
'Because right now you have a decision to make...' — transitions from offer to crossroads close
'Think about it...' — future pacing transitions used multiple times
narrative_flow.pacing_notes: Opens with a rapid-fire hook and big promise, then waves between education/revelation and proof bursts. The root cause reveal section slows down considerably with detailed animations and visual explanations. Energy builds during the trigger event and testimonial clusters. The offer section maintains steady pacing through the bonus stack. The close escalates through crossroads framing, future pacing, urgency, and multiple CTAs.
repetition_patterns: 'Contact is everything in golf' / 'contact is king' — repeated 5+ times as the thesis statement
'10 shots on the range' — repeated 8+ times as the speed/ease promise
'fat shots, thin shots, and shanks/whiffs' — the problem triad repeated 7+ times
'15 to 25 yards farther' — distance promise repeated 4+ times
'the ball is NOT the bottom of your swing' — root cause phrase repeated 4+ times
'the perfect strike point' — mechanism name repeated 6+ times
'Simple Strike Sequence' — product name repeated 15+ times
'No more...' — anaphora pattern used for emotional impact (no more overthinking, no more sneaking out, no more embarrassment)
'You'll NEVER miss again' — permanence promise repeated
callbacks: Moe Norman: introduced in lead (Tiger Woods reference), expanded in origin story, referenced in 'you don't need a perfect swing' section, echoed in 'contact is king' thesis
'Bandaids on bullet wounds': used in lead to dismiss traditional advice, callback when mechanism is revealed to reinforce why root cause fix is different
The '10 shots' promise: first stated in lead, repeated in mechanism reveal, in trigger event proof, in offer description, and in multiple CTAs
'Contact is everything': learned from Moe (origin story), proven in agitation section (graphic), restated in crossroads close
Fat/thin/shank triad: introduced in lead, proven with animations in root cause section, shown eliminated in testimonials, referenced in future pacing

value_stack_sequence.item_description: Step-by-step HD video training filmed at Raven Golf Course in Arizona with professional film crew. Walks through the 10-shot sequence (No-Turn Backswing + Low Point Control Drill) for permanently fixing contact issues with irons. Lifetime online access.
Video series showing how to implement the Simple Strike Sequence with the driver. ONE simple setup tweak for hitting up on the ball. Adds 25-35 yards off the tee. Includes fastest way to fix a slice.

All-Access Pass to never-before-seen video training from top golf instructors (James Sieckmann, Kevin Weeks, Dr. Deborah Graham, Brian Mogg, Eric Cogorno). 'Netflix of Golf.' Clear step-by-step plans for dropping strokes. Continues at $19/month after trial.
Live online academy-style lesson with Martin Chuck. Ask any follow-up questions. Martin demonstrates live on camera. Replay available. One full hour or more.
Chance to win all-expenses-paid trip to Arizona for a 3-day LIVE in-person Tour Striker Academy with Martin and his team.

value_stack_sequence.item: The Confidential Guide To Ball Striking Equipment
value_stack_sequence.item_description: Confidential guide based on years of research and member surveys. Best-performing gear recommendations for amateurs. Inside connections for significant discounts. Coupons worth over $1,000.

price_psychology.price_per_day: Not explicitly stated, but implied as 'less than 3% of academy cost'
price_psychology.price_justification: Students fly in from all over the world paying $3,500+ for academy plus travel. Martin wants to reach the majority of golfers who can't attend in person. Not paying $744 for bonuses. Not even $197 (main website price). This special discount is a thank you for watching.

Less than 3% of what it costs to attend an academy

bonuses.bonus_name: The Confidential Guide To Ball Striking Equipment
bonuses.bonus_description: Research-based equipment guide with best gear recommendations for amateurs and exclusive discount coupons worth over $1,000.

offer.unique_mechanism_claim: Only program built on the Simple Strike Sequence — the 10-shot technique that addresses the ONE root cause of all contact problems (low point control) rather than surface-level swing fixes. Developed over 35 years and 50,000+ lessons, proven in 1,000+ academies, and originated from observation of Moe Norman (Tiger Woods' pick for purest ball striker ever).

close.cta_text: Click the button below this video to get instant access to the Simple Strike Sequence today

sequence.text: Simply click the button that's directly below this video. You'll then be taken to our secure checkout page trusted by over 259,000 happy customers where you'll enter your basic information. It only takes about 30 seconds.

Depending on what time of day it is for you... You could watch the training today... Head to the range this afternoon... Hit the 10 shots required in this sequence... and immediately make the purest, most flush contact of your entire life... And it won't just be once... you'll hit shot after shot... Perfectly flush... over and over with ultimate consistency.

And if you're still thinking... 'What if this doesn't work for me?' Well, first of all, if that happens you'll be an outlier... But in the extremely unlikely event that occurs... know that you're also getting a 365-Day, Flush It Or It's Free, 100% Money Back Guarantee... PLUS, our unconditional refund policy. That means you can try this out completely risk-free... and take up to an entire YEAR to decide how much you love it.

Before/after video testimonials: 'I've always tried to hit ball first... but never have been able to do it. Today I hit like 15 in a row perfectly flush. It's amazing actually.' / 'My contact has never felt so good. But not only that. I was hitting it dead straight. And farther!'

I'm only offering this special discount pricing for a limited time. If you come back to this presentation tomorrow, or next week, there's a very real chance you'll be asked to pay the full $197 listed on our main website.

Right now you have a decision to make that will have a permanent effect on your golf game. Contact is EVERYTHING in golf. You really only have 2 options. Option 1: Do nothing — your contact and ability to play respectable golf will be in exactly the same place 6 months from now. Option 2: Invest in the Simple Strike Sequence with zero risk — this same training has worked in 1,000+ academies and changed tens of thousands of students' lives.

I'm asking you to spend 10 shots to finally start making perfectly flush contact... Watch how long it takes before that rush of confidence starts flowing through you... You are no longer a struggling golfer stuck on the range... You're now making solid contact on every shot... You're now flushing dollar bill divots that send your ball directly on target... Hitting more greens in regulation... And shooting the scores you've always dreamed of. With your contact dialed in... You'll have everything you need to start playing GREAT GOLF! And you know what's more fun than great golf? You guessed it... NOTHING.

This presentation is ending as I speak... and if you come back later I can't guarantee the discounted price... or the bonuses... or the guarantee... will still be here. There are only 10 seconds left until this presentation ends.

Grab the Simple Strike Sequence training series now by clicking the button below this video... so you can start making pure contact... for life. I'm Martin Chuck... Thank you for watching... And I can't wait to hear your success story!

close.future_pacing_text: Think about it... I'm asking you to spend 10 shots to finally start making perfectly flush contact... Using the most proven ball striking sequence ever developed... And when you use the Simple Strike Sequence... Watch how long it takes before that rush of confidence starts flowing through you... The type of confidence where you can swing as hard as you want... Because you know that mishits, including fat shots... thin shots... and even outright whiffs... have been ejected from your bag... You are no longer a struggling golfer stuck on the range... You're now making solid contact on every shot... You're no longer taking mulligans or having to pick up because it gets so bad... You're now flushing dollar bill divots that send your ball directly on target... Hitting more greens in regulation... And shooting the scores you've always dreamed of. With your contact dialed in... You'll have everything you need to start playing GREAT GOLF! And you know what's more fun than great golf? You guessed it... NOTHING.
close.final_objection_handling: Addresses 'what if it doesn't work?' by calling it an outlier event and pointing to the 365-day unconditional guarantee. Addresses 'I need to think about it' with zero-risk framing. Addresses cost hesitation by comparing to $3,500 academy. Addresses 'I can come back later' with expiring discount/bonuses/guarantee threat.
close.final_push: There's really no need to go on struggling with poor contact for the rest of your life... There's no need to guess... by trying to figure it all out yourself through years of trial-and-error. And there's definitely no way to play 'good golf' if you don't have a proven plan for transforming your contact... So, I've already done all the hard work for you. No more spinning your wheels... No more thinking that this game is too hard... And no more suffering from embarrassment... avoiding your buddies because you don't think you have what it takes.
close.risk_reversal_restatement: 365-Day Flush It Or It's Free guarantee restated twice — once in mid-close and once in crossroads close: 'Plus it allows ME to take all the risk for you... With my 365-Day, Flush It Or It's Free, 100% Money Back Guarantee.'

metadata.raw_swipe_file: SSTS - Video Script - VSL Page - 5_29 - Tony_Donnie.md
metadata.big_idea_name: The Simple Strike Sequence / The Ball Is Not At The Bottom Of Your Swing
metadata.central_concept: Contact is everything in golf — without it, nothing else matters (speed, swing path, distance). The ONE root cause of ALL contact problems is that golfers try to hit the ball at the bottom of their swing, which is physically impossible because the body rotates and shifts the low point forward during the downswing. The Simple Strike Sequence is a 10-shot technique that retrains your body to hit the 'perfect strike point' (ball first, then ground). Part 1 uses a No-Turn Backswing to dial in swing path without overthinking. Part 2 uses a Low Point Control Drill to naturally produce ball-first contact with surgical divots. Developed over 35 years and 50,000+ lessons by Martin Chuck (who learned the foundational principle from observing Moe Norman, Tiger Woods' pick for purest ball striker ever), the sequence has been proven in 1,000+ golf academies and works for absolute beginners to decades-long veterans — in just 10 shots on the range.
metadata.extractor_notes: This is a highly effective golf instruction VSL from Performance Golf featuring Martin Chuck and the Simple Strike Sequence product. The copy includes multiple leads (Lead 1, Lead 2, Lead 3) — Lead 2 is the primary/winning version analyzed here. The document also contains old test copy, alternative product build-ups, and multiple price test variants ($47 through $159). The mechanism is exceptionally well-demonstrated through 3D animations and slow-motion video, which is unusual for the category. The root cause reframe ('the ball is NOT at the bottom of your swing') is simple but genuinely illuminating for the target audience. No formal scientific studies are cited (zero in the studies proof category), which is appropriate for this niche — instead, proof is dominated by demonstrations and testimonials. The 365-day guarantee with 'Flush It Or It's Free' naming is an extreme risk reversal that supports the high-confidence tone. The Scratch Club inclusion creates a continuity revenue stream ($19/month after 14-day trial). Multiple draft annotations and production notes remain in the document (camera direction, video clip references), indicating this is a working production document rather than finished copy.
